title: Validate build/test/typecheck/lint pipeline
description: From a clean state: rm -rf node_modules apps/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules; pnpm install; pnpm -r build (must succeed in topo order types -> crypto -> libvex -> spire); pnpm -r typecheck; pnpm -r test; pnpm -r lint. Fix issues that emerge (most likely: catalog mismatches, peerDep warnings, workspace path changes in tsconfig 'extends').
acceptance_criteria: All four pnpm -r commands exit 0 from a fresh clone.
notes: When validating, expect TS2883 errors in apps/spire/src/server/{avatar,file,invite,user}.ts about Router types from @types/express-serve-static-core (a transitive type dep). Two fixes possible: (a) add explicit Router import + return-type annotation in each file; (b) hoist @types/express-serve-static-core as a direct devDep in apps/spire/package.json. Verified during ku2: types/crypto/libvex build clean; only spire fails. Caused by pnpm's isolated node_modules vs. npm's flat hoisting (pre-monorepo).

title: Switch all packages from npm to pnpm tooling
description: Each imported package has 'preinstall: npx only-allow npm' and packageManager: 'npm@10.9.2'. Remove these (root package.json sets pnpm). Drop package-lock.json from all four sub-packages. Spire has 'postinstall: npm rebuild better-sqlite3' — port to a root-level approach or onlyBuiltDependencies (already in chat-ui-monorepo's pnpm config). libvex has a custom preinstall guard checking npm/ — remove.
acceptance_criteria: No package-lock.json under apps/ or packages/; no preinstall only-allow npm; pnpm install green from a clean state.

title: Wire internal cross-package deps to workspace:* and apply catalog
description: In apps/spire/package.json change @vex-chat/crypto:2.1.2 -> workspace:*, @vex-chat/types:2.0.0 -> workspace:*, @vex-chat/libvex:5.3.1 -> workspace:* (devDep). In packages/crypto/package.json: peerDeps + devDeps for @vex-chat/types -> workspace:*. In packages/libvex/package.json: @vex-chat/types and @vex-chat/crypto -> workspace:*. Replace duplicated dev deps (typescript, vitest, eslint, prettier, husky, lint-staged, changesets, etc.) with catalog: references where defined in pnpm-workspace.yaml. Delete per-package package-lock.json files (npm artifacts; we use pnpm now).
design: Stop publishing-then-installing the internal graph; pnpm symlinks live source instead. Verdaccio scripts in chat-ui-monorepo will keep working for THAT repo (still needs published artifacts) — out of scope to update chat-ui-monorepo here.
acceptance_criteria: pnpm install resolves the workspace graph; pnpm why @vex-chat/types in apps/spire shows the workspace package, not a registry version.

title: Import spire into apps/spire/ with full git history
description: Same recipe: clone ~/Public/spire to /tmp/import-spire, filter-repo --to-subdirectory-filter apps/spire --tag-rename '':'spire-v', merge --allow-unrelated-histories spire-import/master. 371 commits inbound. Goes in apps/ (not packages/) per layout decision: spire is the deployable server.
acceptance_criteria: apps/spire/ populated; history preserved; tags as spire-v*.

title: Import libvex-js into packages/libvex/ with full git history
description: Same recipe: clone ~/Public/libvex-js to /tmp/import-libvex, filter-repo --to-subdirectory-filter packages/libvex --tag-rename '':'libvex-v', merge --allow-unrelated-histories libvex-import/master. 604 commits inbound — largest of the four.
acceptance_criteria: packages/libvex/ populated; git log --follow walks back to original; tags namespaced libvex-v*.

title: Import crypto-js into packages/crypto/ with full git history
description: Same recipe as types import: clone ~/Public/crypto-js to /tmp/import-crypto, filter-repo --to-subdirectory-filter packages/crypto --tag-rename '':'crypto-v', then merge --allow-unrelated-histories crypto-import/master into protocol main. 146 commits inbound.
acceptance_criteria: packages/crypto/ populated; history preserved via git log --follow; tags namespaced as crypto-v*.

title: Import types-js into packages/types/ with full git history
description: git clone --no-local ~/Public/types-js /tmp/import-types; cd /tmp/import-types; git filter-repo --to-subdirectory-filter packages/types --tag-rename '':'types-v'; in protocol: git remote add types-import /tmp/import-types && git fetch types-import && git merge --allow-unrelated-histories types-import/master -m 'merge: import types-js into packages/types/ with history'; git remote remove types-import; rm -rf /tmp/import-types. Verify git log packages/types/src/index.ts shows commits going back to original repo.
design: filter-repo (not subtree): rewrites paths so blame/log work back to commit one. Tag rename namespaces to types-v* avoiding collision with crypto/libvex tags. Source repo at ~/Public/types-js is untouched (we cloned it). 139 commits inbound.
acceptance_criteria: packages/types/ contains src/, package.json, etc; git log --follow packages/types/src/index.ts walks back to original commits; protocol git log shows merge commit.

title: Scaffold pnpm workspace skeleton at root
description: Mirror chat-ui-monorepo: pnpm-workspace.yaml (packages: apps/*, packages/*; catalog block for shared deps; minimumReleaseAge; onlyBuiltDependencies for better-sqlite3 + argon2 + esbuild + msgpackr-extract); root package.json (private:true, packageManager pnpm@10.30.3, scripts: dev/build/test/typecheck/lint/format -r --if-present, preinstall only-allow pnpm); root tsconfig.json (strict base from chat-ui); mise.toml + .tool-versions; .prettierrc + .prettierignore; eslint.config.js (importing @vex-chat/eslint-config base — see follow-up); .husky/ pre-commit + lint-staged at root; .npmpackagejsonlintrc.json. NO package code yet — pure scaffolding.
design: Use chat-ui-monorepo's exact files as starting templates; deltas: catalog values from version-decision task; add @vex-chat/types, crypto, libvex, spire to minimumReleaseAgeExclude; add argon2 to onlyBuiltDependencies (spire needs it).
acceptance_criteria: pnpm install on the empty workspace succeeds; pnpm -r build is a no-op (no packages yet).

title: Make initial commit on protocol master
description: Currently protocol has no commits — only staged scaffold (.beads, .claude, .gitignore, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md). git merge --allow-unrelated-histories requires HEAD to exist, so commit the scaffold first. Default branch is master (matches the source repos being imported, eliminating a rename step on each import). After this, the working tree is the empty-but-real base we merge into.
acceptance_criteria: git log shows one commit on master; git status is clean.

title: Confirm spire placement: apps/spire vs packages/spire
description: Spire is published as @vex-chat/spire on npm AND deployed via webhook from release.yml. chat-ui-monorepo convention: apps/ = deployable end products, packages/ = shared libs. Recommendation: apps/spire (it's a server). Confirm before filter-repo runs since the prefix is baked into rewritten history.
acceptance_criteria: Decision documented; downstream import task uses the agreed prefix.
notes: DECISION 2026-04-29: apps/spire/. Rationale: spire is the deployable server; apps/ matches chat-ui-monorepo's convention (apps/ = deployable end products like desktop/mobile, packages/ = shared libs). Spire still publishes as @vex-chat/spire on npm — pnpm doesn't care which directory a publishable workspace member lives in.

title: Decide unified tool versions (TS, vitest, node, pnpm)
description: Pick canonical versions before importing. Options: TS 5.9.3 (chat-ui) vs 6.0.2 (the four libs); vitest 3.2.4 (chat-ui, libvex) vs 4.1.4 (spire/types/crypto). Recommendation: TS 6.0.2 + vitest 4.1.4 (libs are newer + already migrated), node 24.14.0, pnpm 10.30.3. Record final choices and the catalog: block to use.
acceptance_criteria: Decision recorded in design notes; pnpm-workspace.yaml catalog values agreed.
notes: DECISION 2026-04-29: TypeScript 6.0.2, vitest 4.1.4, node 24.14.0, pnpm 10.30.3. Rationale: all four protocol repos already migrated to TS 6.0.2 + vitest 4.1.4. chat-ui-monorepo's TS ~5.9.3 / vitest 3.2.4 are older — keeping the new monorepo on the newer pins avoids a regression. Catalog values for pnpm-workspace.yaml will reflect these.

title: EPIC: Merge spire/types/crypto/libvex into protocol monorepo
description: Umbrella tracking the consolidation of four sibling repos (~/Public/spire, types-js, crypto-js, libvex-js) into ~/Public/protocol as a pnpm workspace monorepo modeled on chat-ui-monorepo. Goal: kill the Verdaccio cross-publish dance, unify tooling, and keep full git history per package. Layout: apps/spire, packages/{types,crypto,libvex}.

title: Cleanup pass: remove redundant top-level files, verify history
description: Delete duplicated LICENSE/LICENSE-COMMERCIAL/LICENSING.md/CLA.md/SECURITY.md/CONTRIBUTING.md from each sub-package (keep one canonical set at root); each package retains its CHANGELOG.md (changesets needs it per-package). Verify git log --follow apps/spire/src/run.ts goes back to the original spire repo's first commit; verify packages/types/src/index.ts blame works. Verify tags landed namespaced (git tag | head: spire-v*, libvex-v*, crypto-v*, types-v*).
acceptance_criteria: One LICENSE + one SECURITY.md + one CONTRIBUTING.md at root; per-package CHANGELOG.md retained; history verification passes for at least one file per package.
notes: Closed scope-reduced. Bead description called for deleting LICENSE/LICENSE-COMMERCIAL/LICENSING.md/CLA.md/SECURITY.md/CONTRIBUTING.md from each sub-package. Doing so would break (a) npm publish — each tarball needs its own LICENSE; the 'files:' array in each package.json lists LICENSE-COMMERCIAL + LICENSING.md as ship artefacts; (b) in-repo doc links — per-package CONTRIBUTING.md references ./CLA.md and ./LICENSING.md by relative path. Compromise: added root LICENSE/SECURITY.md/CONTRIBUTING.md/CLA.md as canonical informational copies, kept all per-package files intact. History verification (the bead's other deliverable) was completed in full.

title: Unify GitHub Actions: build, release, codeql, scorecard, auto-changeset
description:
Each source repo brought in its own .github/workflows/ (build.yml, release.yml, codeql.yml, scorecard.yml, auto-changeset.yml — except spire whose release is folded into build.yml). Imported under apps/spire/.github and packages/*/.github they're inert (Actions only reads from repo root). Pull them up to a single .github/workflows/ at protocol root, parameterized per-package: matrix-build the four, release-please via changesets/action publishing all packages with provenance, deploy-hook job firing only when @vex-chat/spire is included in the published set (preserves spire's webhook-on-publish coupling).

ALSO update .changeset/config.json with these protocol-monorepo decisions:
  - updateInternalDependencies: 'minor' (currently 'patch' from imports — patch causes churn republishes of dependents on every types patch; minor only republishes when range needs to shift)
  - bumpVersionsWithWorkspaceProtocolOnly: true (guard rail against changesets rewriting non-workspace ranges)
  - changelog: ['@changesets/changelog-github', { repo: 'vex-protocol/protocol' }] (PR/commit links in CHANGELOG; install @changesets/changelog-github at root devDeps)
  - baseBranch: 'master' (already correct from spire's config)

ALSO add 'publishConfig: { access: public, registry: https://registry.npmjs.org/ }' to packages/types/package.json — currently missing; required for scoped npm publish without --access.

Provenance setup in unified release.yml:
  - permissions: { contents: write, id-token: write, pull-requests: write }
  - publish script: 'pnpm publish -r --access public --provenance' (or set NPM_CONFIG_PROVENANCE=true env)
  - Each package.json must have a 'repository' field (already present in all four)
acceptance_criteria: .github/workflows/ at root has unified workflows; package-level .github/ removed; CI green on a no-op PR; spire deploy-hook fires only on spire publish; pnpm changeset status from root reports each package version correctly with the new config; pnpm publish --dry-run -r reports provenance attestation hooks.

title: Consolidate .changeset/ to monorepo root
description: Each imported package has its own .changeset/ folder with a config.json scoped to that package. Move/merge them into a single root .changeset/config.json that handles all four packages. Pending changeset .md files (e.g. spire .changeset/add-device-approvals.md) move to root .changeset/ untouched — frontmatter already references the package name. Verify with: pnpm changeset status.
design: changesets/cli supports monorepos natively when run from root; per-package config.json is redundant. Drop 'access: public' default if any package needs different (none do here — all four publish public).
acceptance_criteria: Single root .changeset/config.json; pnpm changeset status from root reports each package version correctly; pending changesets retained.

title: Consolidate per-package tooling configs to root
description:
Each of the four imported packages ships its own .prettierrc, .prettierignore, eslint.config.js, .husky/, .npmpackagejsonlintrc.json, .tool-versions, mise.toml, lint-staged config. The root scaffold task already created root versions. Delete the per-package duplicates and have packages extend root configs (e.g. eslint via @vex-chat/eslint-config base). Keep per-package tsconfig.json (extends root) and tsconfig.build.json (per-package output paths).

ALSO migrate cross-package deps from workspace:* to workspace:^ (in apps/spire and packages/{crypto,libvex} package.json — anywhere @vex-chat/types, crypto, or libvex appears as dep, devDep, or peerDep). The current workspace:* (from ku2) publishes as exact version pin, breaking SemVer dedup for downstream consumers. workspace:^ publishes as caret range — the standard for published SDK libraries (consensus per pnpm.io and changesets docs).
acceptance_criteria: Per-package directories contain only tsconfig*.json + package.json + src/ + scripts/ + docs (no .prettierrc, no eslint.config.js redundant with root, no per-package .husky). All cross-package @vex-chat/* deps use workspace:^ (verified by grep workspace:* apps/ packages/ returning empty).

title: Port @vex-chat/eslint-config from chat-ui-monorepo to packages/eslint-config
description: chat-ui-monorepo has packages/eslint-config (eslint-config-prettier + eslint-plugin-perfectionist + typescript-eslint). Each of the four source repos has its own eslint.config.js — we want to converge on a shared base. Copy chat-ui's package as packages/eslint-config and have spire/types/crypto/libvex extend it. Do this BEFORE imports so per-package eslint configs can be deleted/replaced post-merge without churn.
acceptance_criteria: packages/eslint-config workspace member resolves; root eslint.config.js imports from it.

title: Update chat-ui-monorepo to consume protocol packages from registry (followup)
description: chat-ui-monorepo's pnpm-workspace.yaml catalog references @vex-chat/libvex / types / crypto from npm registry (with minimumReleaseAgeExclude). After protocol's first release publishes the four packages from the new monorepo, no chat-ui-monorepo change is strictly needed (same package names, same registry). Verify by: bumping protocol packages, publishing, then running pnpm update in chat-ui-monorepo. Optional: switch chat-ui's local-dev story from Verdaccio to a pnpm overrides file pointing at ../protocol/packages/* for live linking.
acceptance_criteria: chat-ui-monorepo can install latest published versions from new monorepo; Verdaccio scripts work or are replaced with workspace-style overrides.

value: User signs commits themselves at end of work. Use --no-gpg-sign on every git commit (CLI is configured with ED25519-SK hardware key requiring touch). Why: user request 2026-04-29 — they sign before finishing rather than per-commit. How to apply: pass --no-gpg-sign to every git commit invocation in this repo unless the user says otherwise.

Monorepo import recipe (per source repo, run from anywhere). VERIFIED working on types-js 2026-04-29.

1. rm -rf /tmp/import-<name>
2. git clone --no-local ~/Public/<repo> /tmp/import-<name>
3. cd /tmp/import-<name> && git filter-repo --to-subdirectory-filter <prefix> --tag-rename 'v':'<name>-v'
4. cd ~/Public/protocol && git remote add <name>-import /tmp/import-<name>
5. git fetch <name>-import --tags    # MUST use --tags flag — default fetch only follows tags reachable from fetched refs, missing tags on side branches
6. git merge --no-gpg-sign --allow-unrelated-histories <name>-import/master -m '...'
7. git remote remove <name>-import && rm -rf /tmp/import-<name>

Tag rename pattern is 'v':'<name>-v' (substitute leading v) NOT '':'<name>-v' (which prepends, producing e.g. types-vv0.11.0 — double v).

Always use --no-gpg-sign on merge commit (user signs at end).

Prefixes: types-js->packages/types, crypto-js->packages/crypto, libvex-js->packages/libvex, spire->apps/spire. Source repos AND protocol all use 'master'. Do NOT touch source repos. git-filter-repo at /opt/homebrew/bin/git-filter-repo.

Protocol monorepo publishing decisions (2026-04-29, after deep research on pnpm + changesets):

PRINCIPLE: Always use workspace: refs internally. pnpm rewrites them at publish time — workspace:* becomes exact pin, workspace:^ becomes caret range, workspace:~ becomes tilde range. The published tarball never contains the workspace: form.

DECISIONS:
1. Cross-package @vex-chat/* refs use 'workspace:^' (NOT workspace:*). Caret publishes as ^X.Y.Z, the standard for published SDK libraries. workspace:* publishes as exact pin and breaks downstream SemVer dedup.
2. Versioning is independent (no linked, no fixed). Each of types/crypto/libvex/spire bumps at its own pace; changesets auto-bumps dependents via updateInternalDependencies.
3. updateInternalDependencies: 'minor' (NOT 'patch'). With 'patch', every patch in types triggers no-op republishes of crypto/libvex/spire. With 'minor', dependents only republish when the new version leaves the existing range.
4. bumpVersionsWithWorkspaceProtocolOnly: true. Guard rail against changesets accidentally rewriting non-workspace external ranges.
5. changelog plugin: '@changesets/changelog-github' with repo 'vex-protocol/protocol'. Adds PR/commit links to CHANGELOG entries.
6. publishConfig.access: 'public' on every PUBLISHED package.json. types currently missing — must add. crypto/libvex/spire already have it.
7. Provenance: pnpm publish -r --access public --provenance, with permissions: id-token: write, contents: write. Each package.json needs a 'repository' field (all four already do).
8. Internal deps NEVER use published versions (e.g. NEVER pin crypto's types dep to '2.0.0' from npm). Always workspace: refs. Only exception: a dedicated smoke-test package that installs the published artifact end-to-end (overkill for now).
9. Spire's deploy-hook stays gated on its own publish via changesets/action's publishedPackages output:
   if: contains(fromJson(steps.changesets.outputs.publishedPackages).*.name, '@vex-chat/spire')
10. Private packages (root, packages/eslint-config) auto-skipped by changeset publish via 'private: true'. No manual ignore needed.

Full migration tracked: workspace:* → workspace:^ in protocol-12p. Config changes + publishConfig + provenance in protocol-18d.
